name: Unleash The Beast
text: Give to the Hank McCoy player. Choose one: ● Exhaust your identity, add 2 threat to the main scheme, and flip to alter-ego form → remove this card from the game. ● Deal 2 damage to a friendly character. Discard 1 card from your hand. Discard this obligation.

flavor: Fighting the sadistic, genius, alternate-universe Dark Beast tests Hank to the absolute limit, both mentally and physically.
name: Your Own Worst Enemy
text: When Revealed: As an additional cost to attack Dark Beast, you must discard 1 card from your hand.

flavor: "Don't know who you are. But I know I don't like you."
name: Dark Beast
text: Toughness. When Revealed: Dark Beast activates against you. Forced Response: After Dark Beast activates, place 1 threat on each scheme.

flavor: “Cutting into the flesh, altering the genetic code, twisting and changing... it's enough to make your mouth water, wouldn't you agree?”
name: Inner Turmoil
text: When Revealed: Dark Beast activates against you. Otherwise, place 2 threat on the main scheme.

name: Outer Turmoil
text:
When Revealed: Dark Beast activates against you. If Dark Beast is not in play, find and reveal him.
[star] Boost: If Dark Beast is in play, he activates against you after this activation.
